message:
runtime/repl: add WAIT and WAITAOF command surface with deterministic threshold evaluation

Implements a spec-first replication parity increment for the runtime command surface:
- wires WAIT and WAITAOF as runtime-special commands
- adds replication ack/fsync runtime state and deterministic evaluator-backed handlers
- uses fr-repl evaluate_wait/evaluate_waitaof to compute threshold outcomes
- tracks synthetic primary/fsync offsets for successful write-like commands

Validation and parity artifacts:
- extends FR-P2C-006 replication journey fixture with WAIT baseline case
- adds runtime unit coverage for WAIT/WAITAOF arity, integer validation, and threshold semantics
- updates fr-runtime crate manifest/lock for new fr-repl dependency edge

Verification run:
- cargo fmt --check
- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets
- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
- rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-runtime -- --nocapture
- rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-conformance -- --nocapture

Traceability:
- bead: bd-3pho
- mail thread: br-3pho
